name: Vectis Juros Real Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario - Fii
summary: Vectis Juros Real Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario - Fii is a Brazilian real estate investment fund (FII). It invests primarily in real estate-backed securities and properties with the goal of generating income for its investors through rent and capital appreciation. The fund operates in the Brazilian financial market.
